content: I cannot find where the renaming of channels was discussed. Are the new prefixes really useful? For instance, "theory: category theory" or "practice: applied ct" strike me as a bit redundantly redundant, no?
the prefixes are intended to group related streams together in the side bar, because it's sorted alphabetically
it was discussed in the #general: meta > organization topic
Yes, this is especially useful for languages, which are very much spread around otherwise
I see! To me, it clutters an already dense interface, but definitely not a hill I will die on…
I guess it is inevitable that people here like to categorize things frantically! :)
If this is unbearable for many people we can revert it btw, just give us feedback :slight_smile:
@Christian Williams: when new streams are created, there should be an introductory post explaining what the stream is for
e.g. see the comments in #learning: show and tell
If we get too many large categories we'll need 2-categories. Sorry.
or at least universes, so we can pretend the large categories are small
